summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification for five open PRs. No shared canonical was selected per job guidance. Three PRs are kept non-mutating because they are waiting on author, draft, or already linked to resolved context; two ready focused fixes need maintainer technical review before any merge-adjacent action.

actions.reason: Large independent UI feature with failing proof and waiting-on-author status; no safe close, merge, or shared-canonical decision is available in this inventory shard.
Focused green P1 fix needs maintainer technical/product review; plan mode cannot merge or otherwise finalize it.
Independent risky-infra utility PR with unresolved review feedback and waiting-on-author status; keep non-mutating.
Ready focused media fix needs maintainer technical review before merge-adjacent handling.
Related draft maintainer PR appears tied to an already fixed issue, but exact redundancy is not proven enough for conservative closeout.
